$note: Per-project pipeline behavior. Loaded into every agent (via context-map 'always'). Agents/orchestrator HONOR these values instead of hardcoding them. Edit per project; no prompt edits needed.

$docs.gates.auto_pass: true = orchestrator auto-approves a gate when its audit has 0 blockers (still stops on any blocker). false = always require explicit human approve.
$docs.gates.convergence: Rigor of the quality gates. auto = ASK once at kickoff (full vs lite) for feature/cr/rebuild; bugfix/hotfix are always lite. always = force full (convergence loop) on every change. never = always single-pass (legacy). A runtime flag --rigor=full|lite on the sdlc command overrides this. Honored by the orchestrator.
$docs.gates.stable_rounds: When rigor=full, a convergence gate re-runs its audit until the blocker/gap list is identical this many consecutive rounds before it can PASS. Higher = stricter + slower.
$docs.gates.convergence_gates: Which gates run the convergence loop when rigor=full. Others stay single-pass. Default: spec (SPEC_LOCK) + design (DESIGN_REVIEW) — where business-logic gaps hide.
$docs.qa.testcase_export: Test-case artifact format from qa-test-design. auto = .xlsx when rigor=full (feature/cr/rebuild), markdown when lite (bugfix→md, hotfix→skip). xlsx/md = force that format. none = skip the test-case artifact. Runtime --xlsx/--no-xlsx overrides.
$docs.coverage.diff_threshold: % of CHANGED lines that must be covered (developer S4 gate).
$docs.security.stride_analysis: auto = run STRIDE threat-model only when the feature touches auth/payment/PII; always = every feature; never = skip. Honored by analyst (early risk) + qa.
$docs.test_framework: auto = use the framework in context/stack.md; or pin one (e.g. vitest, jest, playwright, pytest, phpunit).
$docs.sonar_scan: true = run a SonarQube quality gate in S4 if configured; false = skip.
